Klasse ThemeManager

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.ThemeManager
public class ThemeManager extends Object
Centralized theme management for the application. Provides color schemes for both light and dark themes. Supports both static utility methods and instance-based theme management.

  • Verschachtelte Klassen - Übersicht
